rules.rule_text:
title: Legitimate Application Dropped Archive
id: 654fcc6d-840d-4844-9b07-2c3300e54a26
status: test
description: Detects programs on a Windows system that should not write an archive
  to disk
references:
- https://github.com/Neo23x0/sysmon-config/blob/3f808d9c022c507aae21a9346afba4a59dd533b9/sysmonconfig-export-block.xml#L1326
author: frack113, Florian Roth
date: 2022-08-21
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1218
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith:
    - \winword.exe
    - \excel.exe
    - \powerpnt.exe
    - \msaccess.exe
    - \mspub.exe
    - \eqnedt32.exe
    - \visio.exe
    - \wordpad.exe
    - \wordview.exe
    - \certutil.exe
    - \certoc.exe
    - \CertReq.exe
    - \Desktopimgdownldr.exe
    - \esentutl.exe
    - \finger.exe
    - \notepad.exe
    - \AcroRd32.exe
    - \RdrCEF.exe
    - \mshta.exe
    - \hh.exe
    TargetFilename|endswith:
    - .zip
    - .rar
    - .7z
    - .diagcab
    - .appx
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
